title: Roundtable opening answer
description: One model seat's independent, blinded answer to the task. The seat answers the raw prompt without seeing any other seat's answer or any orchestrator framing.

answer.description: The seat's full, self-contained answer to the task.

key_points.description: The main claims, recommendations, or conclusions in the answer — each a concise standalone statement so the orchestrator can diff them across seats.

assumptions.description: Assumptions the seat made to answer.

confidence.description: The seat's confidence (0-100) in its answer.
